comment: GENERATED by gen_fpga_blank.py from device_profiles/vu9p.yaml — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. THE one identical FPGA blank: the internally-connected fabric reference (full real part, undifferentiated). A BLANK ASSIGNS NOTHING: no clock tables, no module names, no placements, no addresses — clocks arrive with the oscillator modules at install (phase 4); boards are identical instances named at addressing (phase 3).
